src/include/catalog/pg_proc.dat
1#----------------------------------------------------------------------
2#
3# pg_proc.dat
4#    Initial contents of the pg_proc system catalog.
5#
6# Portions Copyright (c) 1996-2025, PostgreSQL Global Development Group

8#
9# src/include/catalog/pg_proc.dat
10#
11#----------------------------------------------------------------------
12
13[
14
15# Note: every entry in pg_proc.dat is expected to have a 'descr' comment,
16# except for functions that implement pg_operator.dat operators and don't
17# have a good reason to be called directly rather than via the operator.
18# (If you do expect such a function to be used directly, you should
19# duplicate the operator's comment.)  initdb will supply suitable default
20# comments for functions referenced by pg_operator.
21
22# Try to follow the style of existing functions' comments.
23# Some recommended conventions:
24#
25# "I/O" for typinput, typoutput, typreceive, typsend functions
26# "I/O typmod" for typmodin, typmodout functions
27# "aggregate transition function" for aggtransfn functions, unless
28# they are reasonably useful in their own right
29# "aggregate final function" for aggfinalfn functions (likewise)
30# "convert srctypename to desttypename" for cast functions
31# "less-equal-greater" for B-tree comparison functions
32
33# Note: pronargs is computed when this file is read, so it does not need
34# to be specified in entries here.  See AddDefaultValues() in Catalog.pm.
35
36# Once upon a time these entries were ordered by OID.  Lately it's often
37# been the custom to insert new entries adjacent to related older entries.
38# Try to do one or the other though, don't just insert entries at random.
39
40# OIDS 1 - 99
41

8455# System-view support functions with pretty-print option
8456{ oid => '2504', descr => 'source text of a rule with pretty-print option',
8457  proname => 'pg_get_ruledef', provolatile => 's', prorettype => 'text',
8458  proargtypes => 'oid bool', prosrc => 'pg_get_ruledef_ext' },
8459{ oid => '2505',
8460  descr => 'select statement of a view with pretty-print option',
8461  proname => 'pg_get_viewdef', provolatile => 's', proparallel => 'r',
8462  prorettype => 'text', proargtypes => 'text bool',
8463  prosrc => 'pg_get_viewdef_name_ext' },
8464{ oid => '2506',
8465  descr => 'select statement of a view with pretty-print option',
8466  proname => 'pg_get_viewdef', provolatile => 's', proparallel => 'r',
8467  prorettype => 'text', proargtypes => 'oid bool',
8468  prosrc => 'pg_get_viewdef_ext' },
8469{ oid => '3159',
8470  descr => 'select statement of a view with pretty-printing and specified line wrapping',
8471  proname => 'pg_get_viewdef', provolatile => 's', proparallel => 'r',
8472  prorettype => 'text', proargtypes => 'oid int4',
8473  prosrc => 'pg_get_viewdef_wrap' },
8474{ oid => '2507',
8475  descr => 'index description (full create statement or single expression) with pretty-print option',
8476  proname => 'pg_get_indexdef', provolatile => 's', prorettype => 'text',
8477  proargtypes => 'oid int4 bool', prosrc => 'pg_get_indexdef_ext' },
8478{ oid => '2508', descr => 'constraint description with pretty-print option',
8479  proname => 'pg_get_constraintdef', provolatile => 's', prorettype => 'text',
8480  proargtypes => 'oid bool', prosrc => 'pg_get_constraintdef_ext' },
8481{ oid => '2509',
8482  descr => 'deparse an encoded expression with pretty-print option',
8483  proname => 'pg_get_expr', provolatile => 's', prorettype => 'text',
8484  proargtypes => 'pg_node_tree oid bool', prosrc => 'pg_get_expr_ext' },
8485{ oid => '2510', descr => 'get the prepared statements for this session',
8486  proname => 'pg_prepared_statement', prorows => '1000', proretset => 't',
8487  provolatile => 's', proparallel => 'r', prorettype => 'record',
8488  proargtypes => '',
8489  proallargtypes => '{text,text,timestamptz,_regtype,_regtype,bool,int8,int8}',
8490  proargmodes => '{o,o,o,o,o,o,o,o}',
8491  proargnames => '{name,statement,prepare_time,parameter_types,result_types,from_sql,generic_plans,custom_plans}',
8492  prosrc => 'pg_prepared_statement' },
8493{ oid => '2511', descr => 'get the open cursors for this session',
8494  proname => 'pg_cursor', prorows => '1000', proretset => 't',
8495  provolatile => 's', proparallel => 'r', prorettype => 'record',
8496  proargtypes => '', proallargtypes => '{text,text,bool,bool,bool,timestamptz}',
8497  proargmodes => '{o,o,o,o,o,o}',
8498  proargnames => '{name,statement,is_holdable,is_binary,is_scrollable,creation_time}',
8499  prosrc => 'pg_cursor' },
8500{ oid => '6401', descr => 'get abbreviations from current timezone',

8510  proargnames => '{abbrev,utc_offset,is_dst}',

8512{ oid => '2856', descr => 'get the available time zone names',

8645  proargtypes => 'internal bool', prosrc => 'bool_accum' },

8648  proargtypes => 'internal bool', prosrc => 'bool_accum_inv' },
8649{ oid => '3498', descr => 'aggregate final function',

8658
8659# ANY, SOME? These names conflict with subquery operators. See doc.
8660{ oid => '2518', descr => 'boolean-or aggregate',

12178{ oid => '6003', descr => 'create a replication origin',

12181  prosrc => 'pg_replication_origin_create' },
12182
12183{ oid => '6004', descr => 'drop replication origin identified by its name',
12184  proname => 'pg_replication_origin_drop', provolatile => 'v',
12185  proparallel => 'u', prorettype => 'void', proargtypes => 'text',
12186  prosrc => 'pg_replication_origin_drop' },
12187
12188{ oid => '6005',
12189  descr => 'translate the replication origin\'s name to its id',
12190  proname => 'pg_replication_origin_oid', provolatile => 's',
12191  prorettype => 'oid', proargtypes => 'text',
12192  prosrc => 'pg_replication_origin_oid' },
12193
12194{ oid => '6006',
12195  descr => 'configure session to maintain replication progress tracking for the passed in origin',
12196  proname => 'pg_replication_origin_session_setup', provolatile => 'v',
12197  proparallel => 'u', prorettype => 'void', proargtypes => 'text',
12198  prosrc => 'pg_replication_origin_session_setup' },
12199
12200{ oid => '6007', descr => 'teardown configured replication progress tracking',
12201  proname => 'pg_replication_origin_session_reset', provolatile => 'v',
12202  proparallel => 'u', prorettype => 'void', proargtypes => '',
12203  prosrc => 'pg_replication_origin_session_reset' },
12204
12205{ oid => '6008',
12206  descr => 'is a replication origin configured in this session',
12207  proname => 'pg_replication_origin_session_is_setup', provolatile => 'v',
12208  proparallel => 'r', prorettype => 'bool', proargtypes => '',
12209  prosrc => 'pg_replication_origin_session_is_setup' },
12210
12211{ oid => '6009',
12212  descr => 'get the replication progress of the current session',
12213  proname => 'pg_replication_origin_session_progress', provolatile => 'v',
12214  proparallel => 'u', prorettype => 'pg_lsn', proargtypes => 'bool',
12215  prosrc => 'pg_replication_origin_session_progress' },
12216
12217{ oid => '6010', descr => 'setup the transaction\'s origin lsn and timestamp',
12218  proname => 'pg_replication_origin_xact_setup', provolatile => 'v',
12219  proparallel => 'r', prorettype => 'void', proargtypes => 'pg_lsn timestamptz',
12220  prosrc => 'pg_replication_origin_xact_setup' },
12221
12222{ oid => '6011', descr => 'reset the transaction\'s origin lsn and timestamp',
12223  proname => 'pg_replication_origin_xact_reset', provolatile => 'v',
12224  proparallel => 'r', prorettype => 'void', proargtypes => '',
12225  prosrc => 'pg_replication_origin_xact_reset' },
